data.title: Bitget, in partnership with World Cup champion Julián Álvarez, released a promotional video outlining the UEX strategic vision.
data.description: Bitget recently released a new series of promotional videos starring World Cup champion Julián Álvarez, vividly interpreting its Unlimited Asset Exchange (UEX) concept through football culture. The videos visualize the complex logic of asset allocation as a stylized football equipment store, transforming diverse assets such as crypto assets, tokenized stocks, gold, and forex into sporting elements like footballs, shin guards, and boots. This intuitively conveys the core strategic intent of "one-stop trading of global quality assets," helping users allocate funds more efficiently across different asset classes. Bitget's Chief Marketing Officer, Ignacio Aguirre, stated, "Just as professional football players need the most suitable equipment in the same professional venue, Bitget provides traders with seamless access to diverse assets within a single platform. Compared to traditional trading methods that require frequent platform switching, UEX emphasizes the integration of asset coverage, execution efficiency, and operational flexibility, and this convenience itself is a competitive advantage."

data.title: Web3 Projects Urged to Enhance Transparency Amid Concerns
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, Web3 asset data platform RootData has issued a daily transparency alert on Twitter (X), raising concerns about the funding information of projects such as MBD Financials, Geeq, Waterfall Network, Synthesys, and Rubix. RootData is urging these projects to submit or update their information on its platform to improve their transparency scores. Additionally, RootData has committed to continuously monitoring and exposing 'black box' projects that lack essential information.

RootData's transparency score is designed to assess the completeness and timeliness of a project's information disclosure. The score ranges from A to F, with lower scores indicating less comprehensive information disclosure and higher risks of misconduct. Investors are advised to exercise caution with projects that have lower transparency scores.

data.title: LINK Stabilizes After $13 Reset as ETF Demand Builds – Here Is What Comes Next
data.description:
The cryptocurrency LINK has shown signs of stabilization following a corrective phase that saw its price reset to the $13 mark. As demand for exchange-traded funds (ETFs) related to LINK continues to grow, many investors and analysts are eager to understand the potential implications of this trend. In the coming weeks, we can expect to see important developments that may influence LINK's market trajectory, including increased trading volume, shifting investor sentiment, and potential regulatory updates affecting ETFs. Here is a closer look at what we might anticipate in the near future for LINK and the broader market landscape surrounding it.
source: https://blocknews.com/link-stabilizes-after-13-reset-as-etf-demand-builds-here-is-what-comes-next/

data.title: Gate launches a "Precious Metals Zone," with gold and silver perpetual contracts supporting 50x leverage and 24/7 trading.
data.description: Digital asset trading platform Gate has launched a "Precious Metals Zone," initially offering XAU (gold) and XAG (silver) USDT-margined perpetual contracts. These contracts support leverage up to 50x and provide 24/7 trading. The contracts opened on January 14th at 17:00 (UTC+8), and users can access the zone through the Gate website or app. In terms of product mechanism, the Gate Precious Metals Perpetual Contract Index references prices from multiple comprehensive precious metals trading markets, enhancing pricing transparency and stability, providing a reliable price basis for contract trading, and balancing the pricing logic of traditional financial assets with the risk control needs of crypto market derivatives. In a market environment characterized by strong precious metal prices and the coexistence of safe-haven attributes and volatility, Gate introduces gold and silver into the crypto trading system in the form of standardized perpetual contracts, expanding the asset boundaries of crypto contracts and providing new tools for cross-market capital allocation and trading strategies. Gate stated that it will continue to explore more ways to encrypt traditional assets in the future, and gradually enrich the trading scenarios of diversified derivatives such as indices and commodities under the framework of compliance and risk control.

data.title: Trader pension-usdt.eth closed his ETH long position with a 3x leverage, netting a profit of $4.72 million, bringing his total profit to approximately $27 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, pension-usdt.eth (0x0dd...a902) has completely closed out its 3x long position in ETH, realizing a profit of $4.72 million. This address has accumulated profits of approximately $27 million.

data.title: BREAKING: Ripple Secures 'Massive' EU License Win
data.description:
